item.title: A message from: Mr. Longval-
item.description: Attention: grade 9's to 11's! Anyone interested in playing tackle football in the fall for the Varsity Team, we will be having a pre-camp- May 25, 27 and June 1 and 3. Please sign up outside Mr. Longval's office. Signups close Wednesday May 13.

item.title: A message from the Main Office:
item.description: Students in grades 10 - 12 Representatives from Service Ontario will be visiting STA on Thursday, May 14th to assist students with applying for a health card or driver's license. To book an appointment, please have your parents access the email sent to them.

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Curtis:
item.description: A reminder to students in Grades 7 and 8 interested in writing this year's Waterloo Math Contest that this Wednesday is the last day to sign up. Please add your name to the sign-up sheet in your math class if you are interested!

item.title: A message from: Mme Perron
item.description: Europe team students running the canteen at Thursdays Community Band event are reminded to see Mme Perron at some point today or tomorrow for more information on arrival times and organization. A reminder that Mr. Kwok will be the trip supervising teacher on site for the performance. A special thank you to Mrs Brennan from the whole Europe Team for helping us plant our Poppy Seeds which hopefully will be in full bloom in April prior to our departure to France and Belgium.

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval.
item.description: Congratulations to the Varsity Track and Field athletes for an outstanding performance at yesterday's Prescott Russell Championships. Our students ran fast and long - threw far and jumped long and high. We have a few students headed to the Eastern Ontario Championships next week for 100m, 200m, long jump, high jump, shot put, javelin, 1500 and 3000m runs! Lets go Ravens!

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval:
item.description: Reminding all Varsity Ultimate athletes that your permission form is due today AND we have a practice today afterschool until 3:30pm

item.title: A message from Mme Bourdon:
item.description: Grade 7/8 students interested in participating in the GALA talent show are to see Mme Bourdon during the lunch hour.

item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: All grade 12 students, this is a reminder that tomorrow is your retreat day. Everyone taking the bus to the retreat can meet in the atrium at the beginning of the day, and all those driving themselves can meet us at the Embrun Community Centre at 8:40am. It is a free dress down day for all grade 12 students, and a free lunch is included! Thank you
